title: Submit UnionPay verification for a business license
content:
Use this endpoint to submit UnionPay verification for a business license. Once you submit UnionPay verification, wait for around 20 seconds and use [/advertiser/info/](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1739593083610113) to confirm the status of the ad account. If the ad account is rejected for UnionPay verification failure, resubmit your license information (`license_no` and `license_image_id`) using [/advertiser/update/](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1739939050770434) and then resubmit UnionPay verification using [/bc/advertiser/unionpay_info/submit/](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1813772274039809). To learn more about how to create ad accounts in a Business Center, see [Create an ad account](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1754705407307777#item-link-Create%20an%20ad%20account). > **Note**
> If you submit UnionPay verification multiple times while the ad account is under review, only the initial submission will be accepted. Subsequent submissions will be ignored. ## Before you start - Confirm that your business license requires UnionPay verification using [/bc/advertiser/unionpay_info/check/](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1813772238056449). The `unionpay_verification_required` returned for the `license_no` should be `true`. - Create an ad account with the same `license_no` using [/bc/advertiser/create/](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1739939020318721). This will associate the ad account with the business license requiring UnionPay verification. ## Request **Endpoint** https://business-api.tiktok.com/open_api/v1.3/bc/advertiser/unionpay_info/submit/ **Method** POST **Header** ```xtable |Field{30%}|Data Type{15%}|Description{55%}| |---|---|---| |Access-Token {Required}|string|Authorized access token. For details, see [Authentication](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1738373164380162).| |Content-Type {Required}|string|Request message type.
Allowed format: `application/json`. | ``` **Parameters** ``` xtable |Field{30%}|Data Type{15%}|Description{55%}| |--- |--- |--- | | bc_id {Required} | string | Business Center ID.
You need to have Admin permission for the Business Center.

To obtain the list of Business Centers where you have Admin permission, use [/bc/get/](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1737115687501826) and ensure the returned `user_role` is `ADMIN`. | | advertiser_id {Required} | string | Ad account ID.

You need to specify the ID of the ad account associated with the business license that requires UnionPay verification and have Admin permission for the ad account. | | representative_name {Required} | string | The Chinese name of the legal representative as it appears on the business license. | | representative_document_type | string | The type of the representative document.

Enum values:
  • `ID_CARD`: ID card.
  • `PASSPORT`: Passport.
  • `HK_MACAO_EXIT_ENTRY_PERMIT`: Exit-Entry Permit for Travelling to and from Hong Kong and Macao.
  • `TAIWAN_MAINLAND_TRAVEL_PERMIT`: Mainland Travel Permit for Taiwan Residents.
  • `HK_MACAO_MAINLAND_TRAVEL_PERMIT`: Mainland Travel Permit for Hong Kong and Macao Residents.
Default value: `ID_CARD`. | | representative_id {Required} | string | The ID of the representative document.

  • When `representative_document_type` is `ID_CARD` or not passed, specify the ID card number of the legal representative in 18 digits.
    • Example: `234123190101012345`.
  • When `representative_document_type` is `PASSPORT`, specify the alphanumeric ID of the passport.
    • Example: `EF1234567`.
  • When `representative_document_type` is `HK_MACAO_EXIT_ENTRY_PERMIT`, specify the alphanumeric ID card number of the Exit-Entry Permit for Travelling to and from Hong Kong and Macao.
    • Example: `CA1234567`.
  • When `representative_document_type` is `TAIWAN_MAINLAND_TRAVEL_PERMIT`, specify the numeric ID of the Mainland Travel Permit for Taiwan Residents.
    • Example: `12345678`.
  • When `representative_document_type` is `HK_MACAO_MAINLAND_TRAVEL_PERMIT`, specify the alphanumeric ID Mainland Travel Permit for Hong Kong and Macao Residents.
    • Example: `H12345678`.
| | unionpay_account {Required} | string | The UnionPay account number in 12 to 19 digits. | | representative_phone_number {Required} | string | The phone number of the legal representative in 11 digits.

Example: `13812345678`. | ``` ### Example ```xcodeblock (code curl http) curl --location --request POST 'https://business-api.tiktok.com/open_api/v1.3/bc/advertiser/unionpay_info/submit/' \ --header 'Access-Token: {{Access-Token}}' \ --header 'Content-Type: application/json' \ --data '{ "bc_id": "{{bc_id}}", "advertiser_id": "{{advertiser_id}}", "representative_name": "{{representative_name}}", "representative_id": "{{representative_id}}", "unionpay_account": "{{unionpay_account}}", "representative_phone_number": "{{representative_phone_number}}" }' (/code) ``` ## Response ``` xtable |Field{30%}|Type{15%}|Description{55%}| |---|---|---| |code |number|Response code. For the complete list of response codes and descriptions, see [Appendix-Return Code](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1737172488964097). | |message|string|Response message. For details, see [Appendix - Return Codes](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1737172488964097).| |request_id |string|The log ID of a request, which uniquely identifies the request. | |data |object|Returned data.| ``` ### Example ```xcodeblock (code Success-Response http) HTTPS/1.1 200 OK { "code": 0, "message": "OK", "request_id": "{{request_id}}", "data": {} } (/code) ```
